title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
author: openai-blog
raw_description: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.
summary: OpenAI支持欧盟AI行为准则，推动内容透明度与来源标准，帮助用户识别AI生成内容。
analysis_note: 政策支持类内容，技术深度一般，与AI/LLM核心领域相关性较低。
